name: pinboard
description: Pin files and folders to a persistent Explorer sidebar panel with global/workspace scopes, drag reordering, and quick actions

enumDescriptions: Pinned folders persist across all workspaces.
Pinned folders are scoped to the current workspace.

commands.title: Scope: Global — click to switch to Workspace
Scope: Workspace — click to switch to Global
